generated.findings: Normal cardiac contours, clear lungs, stable granuloma in the left lower lung zone, thoracic spondylosis, and mild pectus excavatum deformity.

ground_truth.findings: The lungs are hyperexpanded, consistent with COPD. Mild cardiomegaly. No focal lung consolidation. No pneumothorax or pleural effusion. Pulmonary vascularity is within normal limits. Mild degenerative changes of the thoracic spine. Aortic calcifications consistent with atherosclerotic disease.
